title: Connect without takeover preserves an incumbent owner

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
A healthy incumbent device session owns the configured device and takeover is omitted.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Submit each tool-specific request with an unsupported_option field to its strict handler schema.
fault_script.expected_effect: Every tool rejects the complete request before handler, controller, adapter, or plane admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: For each tool-specific valid request, advance the fake monotonic clock past its deadline while its admission reservations are held.
fault_script.expected_effect: Every request returns not_sent before admission and releases its queue and request reservations.

fault_script.action: Clear the deterministic deadline injection while preserving the incumbent generation and the normalized request input.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next call with the same request identifier and normalized input reaches ordinary ownership admission rather than an in-flight or idempotency branch.

fault_script.action: Keep the incumbent generation active while a valid request omits takeover.
fault_script.expected_effect: The connect reports CONTROL_BUSY without changing the incumbent generation.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_display_capture only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read call returns DEADLINE_EXCEEDED at phase queue with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, and downstream_stage none; internal evidence records zero admissions and zero downstream writes.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_display_capture deadline injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later tool call inherits the jetkvm_display_capture deadline fault.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_display_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read call returns DEADLINE_EXCEEDED at phase queue with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, and downstream_stage none; internal evidence records zero admissions and zero downstream writes.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_display_status deadline injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later tool call inherits the jetkvm_display_status deadline fault.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_input_keyboard only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_keyboard call expires before admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_keyboard deadline injector while preserving its request and observation reservations for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized keyboard request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_input_mouse only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_mouse call expires before admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_mouse deadline injector while preserving its request and observation reservations for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized mouse request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_input_paste only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_paste call expires before admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_paste deadline injector while preserving its request and observation reservations for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized paste request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_input_release only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_input_release call expires before admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_input_release deadline injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized release request can retry through ordinary admission.

fault_script.action: Arm the jetkvm_power_control-only injector and advance the fake monotonic clock beyond the call's 1000ms deadline before controller admission.
fault_script.expected_effect: The 1000ms request expires deterministically before admission as DEADLINE_EXCEEDED/not_sent with zero controller, adapter, or ATX writes; its request reservation is released.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_power_control deadline injector while preserving the exact normalized request for a new-deadline retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same 1000ms normalized power request receives a fresh deadline, reaches ordinary admission, completes the fixed 200ms press_power pulse, and cannot inherit the expired deadline.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_session_connect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_session_connect call expires before admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_session_connect deadline injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized connect request can retry through ordinary ownership admission.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_session_reconnect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next jetkvm_session_reconnect call expires before admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_session_reconnect deadline injector while preserving its request reservation for retry.
fault_script.expected_effect: The same normalized reconnect request can retry through ordinary ownership admission.

fault_script.action: Arm the deterministic deadline-before-admission injector for jetkvm_session_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read call returns DEADLINE_EXCEEDED at phase queue with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, and downstream_stage none; internal evidence records zero admissions and zero downstream writes.

fault_script.action: Clear the jetkvm_session_status deadline injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later tool call inherits the jetkvm_session_status deadline fault.

steps.expect: Strict schema rejection before controller admission with zero controller and plane calls.
not_sent with the queue slot and request-id reservation released for a subsequent request.
CONTROL_BUSY from ordinary ownership admission, proving the expired queue slot and request-id reservation were released.
CONTROL_BUSY with the incumbent generation unchanged.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_display_capture before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_display_status before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_keyboard before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_mouse before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_paste before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_release before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_power_control before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_session_connect before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_session_reconnect before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_session_status before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.

DEADLINE_EXCEEDED read ToolError with phase queue, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, and details.downstream_stage none. Separately, ordered harness evidence records admission count 0, accepted downstream write count 0, no BrowserPlane call, and no image block.

DEADLINE_EXCEEDED read ToolError with phase queue, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, and details.downstream_stage none. Separately, ordered harness evidence records admission count 0, accepted downstream write count 0, and no BrowserPlane call.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_keyboard before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the deadline fault is cleared, proving the keyboard request and observation reservations were released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_mouse before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the deadline fault is cleared, proving the mouse request and observation reservations were released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_paste before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the deadline fault is cleared, proving the paste request and observation reservations were released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_release before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
applied through ordinary admission after the deadline fault is cleared, proving the release request reservation was released.

DEADLINE_EXCEEDED mutation ToolError with phase queue, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage none. Separately, the fake clock expires the 1000ms deadline before admission and ordered evidence records controller admission count 0, adapter request count 0, and ATX write count 0.

The same normalized request and request_id receive a new 1000ms deadline after fault clear, reach ordinary admission, complete the fixed 200ms press_power pulse once, and return an applied non-retryable result.
Restore and re-prove the ATX serial binding, extension state, and recorded observable baseline before arming the session-connect deadline cell.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_connect before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
CONTROL_BUSY from ordinary ownership admission after the deadline fault is cleared, proving the connect request reservation was released.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_reconnect before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
CONTROL_BUSY from ordinary ownership admission after the deadline fault is cleared, proving the reconnect request reservation was released.

DEADLINE_EXCEEDED read ToolError with phase queue, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, and details.downstream_stage none. Separately, ordered harness evidence records admission count 0, accepted downstream write count 0, and no BrowserPlane call.
CONTROL_BUSY with the incumbent generation unchanged when reconnect omits takeover.

pass.assertion: Schema-invalid input is rejected before controller admission and records zero controller and plane calls.

Each linked mutation call runs under its compatible deadline-before-admission fault and returns not_sent; the three read calls return DEADLINE_EXCEEDED with outcome null and verification none. Separate harness evidence proves zero admissions and zero downstream writes, each one-shot fault is cleared, and every mutation retries the same normalized input to ordinary applied or CONTROL_BUSY handling. The power pair uses identical 1000ms inputs: the first fake deadline is expired before admission, while the fresh retry deadline permits exactly one fixed 200ms press_power pulse.
A connect without takeover returns CONTROL_BUSY and leaves the incumbent generation unchanged.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

The focused deadline assertions and ordered fake/replay events, including the power call's 1000ms pre-admission expiry, zero ATX writes, fresh 1000ms retry deadline, and exactly one completed 200ms press_power pulse.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Unconditionally restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline after the cleared-fault power retry may have written.
restore.assertion: The recorded ATX-observable baseline is restored before the next story.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
